'''Ksiczzic III''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Ksiczzic system/Legends|Ksiczzic system]].

==History==
[[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] fled the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] from [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] to Ksiczzic III, where she boarded the ''[[Quandary]]''.<ref name="TFAD">{{JournalCite|6|To Fight Another Day}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|6|To Fight Another Day|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
